title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, described as a publicly available Mythos-class model with strong capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The company implemented safety systems to limit capabilities in high-risk domains like cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry.
writeup: This video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, presented as a publicly available Mythos-class model with capabilities spanning software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. It notes that Anthropic built in safety systems to limit the model's capabilities in high-risk domains, specifically cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry. The takeaways: a broad-capability model paired with deliberate guardrails constraining its use in areas with elevated misuse potential.
